basic_details.job_title: JIPMER Research Nurse Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Jawaharlal Institute of Postgraduate Medical Education and Research (JIPMER)
basic_details.short_information: Jawaharlal Institute of Postgraduate Medical Education and Research (JIPMER) has published the Research Nurse Notification 2026 at jipmer.edu.in. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 Research Nurse position on a contractual basis. Candidates up to 30 years of age holding a B.Sc. Nursing qualification are eligible to apply via email on or before 16 July 2026. The official notification PDF and email application details are available below.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for JIPMER Research Nurse Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 16-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download JIPMER Research Nurse Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download JIPMER Research Nurse Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: JIPMER Research Nurse Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the JIPMER Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download JIPMER Research Nurse Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for JIPMER Research Nurse Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 16-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: JIPMER Research Nurse Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the JIPMER Research Nurse position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the JIPMER Research Nurse position is 16th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Nurse post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a BSc Nursing degree and should have at least one year of relevant experience to be eligible for the Research Nurse position at JIPMER.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Research Nurse recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Research Nurse position is 30 years. There might be age relaxations for certain categories as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Research Nurse role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Research Nurse position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 21,800 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the JIPMER Research Nurse vacancy?
faq.answer: Interested candidates need to apply via email by sending their resume and required documents to the official email address provided in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the JIPMER Research Nurse recruitment involves a written test followed by an interview. Candidates need to perform well in both stages.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the JIPMER Research Nurse application?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the JIPMER Research Nurse recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the total number of vacancies for the Research Nurse post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Research Nurse post in this recruitment drive by JIPMER.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this JIPMER recruitment?
faq.answer: The Research Nurse position is a contract-based job. Candidates will be appointed on a contractual basis for the duration of the project or as specified in the appointment letter.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is highly recommended to read the notification thoroughly before applying.
